nasb.text: Zaccheus was trying to see who Jesus was, and was unable because of the crowd, for he was small in stature.

esv.text: And he was seeking to see who Jesus was, but on account of the crowd he could not, because he was small in stature.

cnv.text: 他想看看耶穌是怎麼樣的，因為人多，他又身材矮小，就看不見。

ccb.text: 他想看看耶稣，可是因为周围人多，他身材矮小，无法看见。

csbs.text: 他很想看看耶稣是什么样的人，可是因为他身材矮小，从人群中无法看到耶稣。
